programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Emergency Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing emergency machines: a mine rescue ambulance, an incident command unit and a fire boat.

programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Echoes'. Woolly explains what echoes are when Tig gets frightened at a castle.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Snow Business'. The cloud has been on holiday in space, but returns freezing cold and snowing, not raining. Tiny comes up with a clever plan to warm the cloud up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S13/E16 - Sleep Over'. The Teletubbies take their favourite things to bed. Laa-Laa struggles with her ball.

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: 'S1/E31 - Looking for Each Other'. Join Upsy Daisy and friends in a magical world halfway between waking and sleeping. Igglepiggle can't find Upsy Daisy, but where could she be?

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E28 - Book Bank'. When Kobi takes Sam, David and Mali to borrow a book they discover the plan to close the local library. Zainab is particularly upset by the closure and works hard on a petition.

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - New Glasses'. Mali seems remarkably keen to visit the opticians but he's bitterly disappointed that he doesn't need new glasses after he'd convinced himself he would get a fancy coloured frame.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Top'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'top' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different tops - a new top, a soft top, a scratchy top and some matchy tops!

programme.title: Nina And The Neurons: Earth Explorers
programme.desc: 'S8/E24 - Gravity'. Nina investigates why astronauts float in space with the help of Felix her touch neuron.

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Playing Hiding With Makka Pakka'. Enter a magical world between waking and sleeping. The Tombliboos have discovered a new game - hiding in the garden. Where have the Tombliboos gone?

programme.title: Kit And Pup
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Melting and Freezing'. Pup is at the beach and Kit is in the snow. Can you see who has the melting ice cream and who has the frozen lolly?

programme.title: Kit And Pup
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 - Vegetables'. Kit and Pup are gardening, but when Kit sees that Pup's freshly dug vegetables are bigger than hers, she is determined to find her own giant one.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Whale'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'whale' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We meet lots of different whales. We see swimming whales, splashing whales and even a singing whale!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service

programme.desc: 'S1/E27 - Baby Jack'. The twins' friend Tony visits with his mum Elaine and new baby brother Jack, and DIY Derek helps them to measure some bunk beds.

programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Quick'. Q sings I Need U, but she can't do it on her own, so unwilling U lends a hand. This episode introduces the letter Q, the pair QU and the words quack, quiz, quick and quit.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S22/E3 - The Untold Story Of Caylee Anthony'. The trial of Casey Anthony for her daughter's murder captivated the American public. In this programme, three of her defense lawyers discuss the shocking case.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S22/E4 - Haunted'. Private investigators Paul Ciolino and Joe Moura examine the brutal killings of Mike Sisco and his fiancée Karen Harkness in 2007, a double homicide with a bizarre twist.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Rosas'. After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years.

programme.title: Descent Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Randy Kraft'. Randy Kraft known as the Scorecard Killer, the Southern California Strangler, and the Freeway Killer, raped, tortured, and murdered a minimum of sixteen young men between 1972 and 1983.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Forensic pathologist Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murder of Yang Liu, a Chinese trader who was killed for his money by his supposed friend, Ming Jang.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E7 - The Highest Stakes'. A 27-year-old woman from Sacramento, California went to a casino to gamble and then vanished. What happened to Christie Wilson and her family when the unthinkable took place?

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E8 - Who Killed The Newlyweds'. The wedding pictures of Dyke and Karen Rhoads show a joyous young couple, but their lives came to a violent end when a fire engulfed their home on July 6th, 1986.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S18/E26 - Defending Your Life'. This is the troubling tale of Jerry Jones Jr. who was tried three times for the murder of his wife. But to this day, he and his two daughters still profess his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S20/E8 - Death Without Mercy'. Jimmy and Shelly Michael had a seemingly perfect marriage. Jimmy ran his own business and Shelly was a nurse, but one morning their bedroom burst into flames as Jimmy slept.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Classified To Kill'. Chicago detectives believe a serial killer is using the classified ads to lure and murder his victims. The investigation is set ablaze when evidence is destroyed, until police make a shock discovery.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Serial Killer
The Mark Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - The Grim Sleeper'. A cold blooded killer conceals his victim's bodies with trash, discarding them like garbage in the back alleys across Los Angeles.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Death By Miracle Cure'. Detectives in Colorado investigate a naturopathic doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Home Alone'. In Hope, Arkansas, Kelly and her team investigate the murder of a young mother who was brutally executed in her home.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Michel Fourniret And Monique Olivier'. Michel Fourniret, who confessed to the kidnap, rape and murder of nine girls over 14 years. His wife, Monique Olivier, exposed him after fearing her own conviction.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Motorway Killer'. The story of a random killing, how police gambled on the revolutionary technique of familial DNA analysis and how it became one of the world's first convictions for the Bloodline Detectives.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Unrighteous Act'. The story of Karen Klaas, how her life was ended so violently and how 41 years later, cutting-edge DNA forensics and the Bloodline Detectives solved her murder.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Serial Killer
The Mark Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Deaths In The Desert'. El Paso investigators race to track down a ruthless killer that is burying his victims in shallow desert graves, dead or alive.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Posed To Kill'. A look into the crimes of The Gainesville Ripper, who killed five students at the University of Florida and left the women posed like dolls.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Stockwell Strangler'. When a string of elderly people were found dead in their beds across south London, New Scotland Yard detectives realised they had a serial killer on their hands.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Widow'. Kelly and Tonya Rider investigate the tragic stabbing death of an elderly woman in her own home just one week after she buried her husband.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - If I Can't Have You, No One Can'. Kelly and her team tackle one of their most emotional cases - the murder of a beautiful college student killed in her bedroom while packing for a trip to visit her parents for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Anthony Shore'. The crimes of Anthony Shore, who was responsible for the slayings of one woman and three girls, and was known as the Tourniquet Killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Motorway Killer'. The story of a random killing, how police gambled on the revolutionary technique of familial DNA analysis and how it became one of the world's first convictions for the Bloodline Detectives.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Motor Mythbusters
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Chop Top And Fast Lane Farts'. The team tests the myth that chopping a vehicle's top will make it go faster. Then they look for the best way to clear obnoxious odours from a vehicle.

programme.title: Shed And Buried
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Episode 8'. In North Yorkshire, Sam and Henry examine an incredible collection of classic American motors. However, the guys are most interested in a rusty Mini.

programme.title: Million Dollar Wheels
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - We Didn't Come This Far...'. After Chadwick's betrayal, RD sends a message to all the LA supercar dealers and plots his next big move. Plus, Melissa lands a whale of a client.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: 'S10/E10'. After a disastrous trip to Elim, Kris needs a new plan to find gold. Shawn is nervous to test out the Myrtle Irene, and Vernon finds gold in Clara Creek.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - A Predator Strikes'. Otto and Charlotte defend against the homestead's first predator attacks. Meanwhile, Atz Lee and Jane travel to Lake Louise to catch massive lake trout.

programme.title: Destroyed In Seconds
programme.desc: 'S1/E63'. Ron Pitts reveals more incredible true stories of destruction, including diners hit by a surprise tornado and a raft of bus crashes caught on camera.

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Adam and a demolition expert stage a series of daring experiments on one of the world's most dangerous and explosive substances: Nitroglycerin.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Volcano's Edge'. The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by lava. They need to find a way of protecting it from future eruptions.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Winter's Fortune
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Gold Moves'. Tony sets his sights on a $3.5-million monster dozer. Dave hunts for a claim with his new Mad Max prospecting machine. Rick tests a pioneering drilling method.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Dirt Presents
programme.desc: 'S9/E3 - Heavy Weighs The Crown'. Tony Beets explains what's really going on with his beloved dredges. Then, he delves deep into his long, rocky relationship with Parker.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Secrets Of Brother XII'. Josh attempts to uncover a treasure left behind by the Aquarian Foundation, an isolated, insidious cult led by the notorious leader known as Brother XII.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - World Biggest Car Factory'. Richard explores Volkswagen's giant car plant in Wolfsburg, Germany. He checks out its futuristic technology and discovers how this mega-factory works!

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S24/E22 - Endoscopes, Megaphones'. Ever wondered how everyday items are made? More common items including endoscopes, megaphones and uranium go under the microscope.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S24/E25 - Thai Barbecues, Diving Masks'. How are everyday objects made? Common items including Thai barbeques, diving masks and fins, and bassoons go under the microscope.

programme.title: Master Of Arms
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Elgin Pistol'. In the quickdraw challenge, three expert craftsmen must build a 19th Century Bowie knife. Next, the two remaining craftsmen must build an Elgin cutlass pistol.

programme.title: Property Wars
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - The Roof Is On Fire'. The Phoenix auction list is huge and Doug is impressed by one house's potential. Later, Scott thinks he may have found the day's big winner - but Ed is not sure.

programme.title: Master Of Arms
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Elgin Pistol'. In the quickdraw challenge, three expert craftsmen must build a 19th Century Bowie knife. Next, the two remaining craftsmen must build an Elgin cutlass pistol.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Ed Vs Matt Wright'. Ed challenges Matt 'The Juggernaut' Wright, in the Wanshan Archipelago off the coast of southern China. They race to build rafts as storms roar in.

programme.title: The Wheel: Survival Games
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Soaked And Starving'. The second phase of The Wheel wears down the remaining participants. On the island, Adam fails to make fire and suffers the consequences.

programme.title: Taking Fire
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Flipping The Switch'. Sgt Adams is determined to get his men home safely - but it won' be easy. The men are getting desensitised to the non-stop fire and have unusual ways of coping.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: 'S10/E11'. The revamped Myrtle Irene is back in action and on the hunt for gold. Vernon gives Steve another opportunity, and Kris finally finds some gold.

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Adam teams up with actor Gary Oldman to build one of Hollywood's deadliest weapons: the ZF1 multi-artillery gun from sci-fi film, The Fifth Element.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Quake Shattered'. After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves a log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a new building.

programme.title: Catching Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Feast Or Famine'. It's midway through the bluefin tuna season. Some fishermen have waited until the halfway point to catch the biggest fish possible - but have they made the right choice?

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Big Bad Bonefish'. Lake Windsor on Inagua Island is home to a mystery. How did giant ocean-dwelling fish get there? The team aims to find out - and catch some bonefish.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Great Women Of Ancient Egypt'. Josh traverses the land of the Nile to reveal the secrets of Ancient Egypt's most powerful and elusive women: Hatshepsut, Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid XL
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Goodbye Cruel Waterworld'. Medics closely monitor Jeff's high fever and prepare his evacuation. Plus, one survivalist pushes too hard, leading to a medical emergency on the open sea.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Because Triceratops!/Rock Out'. Tiny performs a triceratops rite of passage. Rocky sets out to prove that he's the ultimate tough guy, like Giganto, but discovers that everyone needs help sometimes.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Air Archie/The Imitator'. Mazu makes Archie a pair of wings to help him fly. Marsh copies Rocky's every move while Rocky copies Giganto.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Biggest Hero/Think Quick'. Rocky gets jealous when Tiny suddenly becomes the go-to hero! Mazu may be a slow runner but is a quick thinker.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Seeing Stars/A Tiny Triumph'. Mazu and her three besties map the stars. Tiny's artistic skills are put to use when the dinos are lost in the desert.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Henry Show/Megabouncers'. After seeing sister Summer's show, Henry decides to do his own. But it proves harder than it looked, and after a disaster, Henry asks for Summer's advice. This time it's a success.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Piano Lesson, Monster Wave'. Henry's thrilled when Gertie turns up, but she's come for a piano lesson with Momma so he tries to sabotage it! Henry goes to the wave park.

programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Bye Bye Beckett, Pet Party'. Summer is upset when Beckett can't come camping, so Henry cheers her up. Beckett's noisy birthday party upsets a new-born baby bird, so they have a quiet joint party.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E56 - Termy Steps Out / the Tooth Fairy'. Termy wants to visit her good friend Hegan's new babies, Pride and Joy. Rocky is excited when Giganto loses a tooth because that means the Tooth Fairy will visit and leave loot!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E57 - Wait for It! / Mr. Careful'. Tiny, Rocky and Bill have a hard time being patient waiting for the lulu fruit to change color. Mazu borrows Rocky's kart and flies it as a plane, but he doesn't know how to fly!

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Paint the Town/ Henry Inc.'. The kids want Roarsville to win the Most Beautiful Town competition. The prize is a new playground. They start tidying, then Henry decides to turn the town into a work of art. Henry, Incorporated:

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E55 - Adventures in Egg Sitting / Rainbow's End'. The four little dinos are tasked with watching Hegan's eggs, which are soon to hatch. When the dinos learn about a treasure at the end of a rainbow, Rocky is determined to find it!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E56 - Termy Steps Out / the Tooth Fairy'. Termy wants to visit her good friend Hegan's new babies, Pride and Joy. Rocky is excited when Giganto loses a tooth because that means the Tooth Fairy will visit and leave loot!

programme.title: Bluey

programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Minnie Goes Ape!'. Daisy takes a trip to Razzle Dazzle Dunes where she turns into a genie and has to grant three wishes. When Minnie transforms into a fairy, she has trouble finding her talent.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Spidey Surprise'. Doc Ock's escape from jail interrupts the Spidey Team's mother's day picnic. Miles must make big decisions to save his mom from Green Goblin's not-so-fun-funhouse.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E116 - Pass the Parcel'. Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E117 - Perfect'. Bluey's Father's Day card has to be perfect, but she can't decide what to draw! Mum reminds her about all the fun times she's had with Dad and how he's not so perfect either.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E118 - Explorers'. While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack pretends to be sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E119 - Phones'. Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurant with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E120 - Pavlova'. The kids play Café so Bingo can eat Pavlova, but Dad the chef never seems to get the order quite right! When Bluey fires him, Dad sets up his own competing shop next door.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E121 - Rain'. When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Car in a Tree/ Dalmatian Day'. When the Firebuds visit the moto-skate park, Piston gets stuck in a tree. The Firebuds are asked to watch puppies, but when Bo underestimates the task, the puppies escape.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Camping Conundrum'. The Spidey Team goes camping, but Old Dam is cracking and about to flood the park. Green Goblin frames the Hulk, and Spidey and Ghosty are determined to prove he's innocent.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E122 - Pizza Girls'. Bluey and Bingo are making mud pizzas and delivering them to the grownups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E124 - Tina'. Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E126 - Faceytalk'. Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the 80s and about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E127 - Ragdoll'. Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy ice cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E92'. There's a new octopus-girl in the city, who wants to be friends with the PJ Masks, but her actions tell a different story. Octobella ruins Gekko's hero reputation.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Alice and Fergie both say that they'll make the best potato dish, but they realize their dishes are the same! Hattie bakes an Inside-Out Cake.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - Keep on Food Truckin'/Pupigan's Island'. The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Live Sunday Service
programme.desc: Join Prophet TB Joshua in a time of powerful prayer, revealing prophecy and incredible deliverance during the Saturday Live Prophetic Service at The SCOAN. As you watch God's power at work, trust in Him that your life will improve.

programme.title: South Korea Crusade Day 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the South Korea Crusade with Prophet T.B. Joshua, 2016 was held at the Sky Dome in the capital city of Seoul. Get ready to watch the real, authentic and forceful power of God that changed countless lives.

programme.title: Laos Giving
programme.desc: Knowing God is love and that there is no love that does not express in giving, Emmanuel TV Team reach the Nation of Laos, in Southeast Asia to express the love of God through the act of giving. As you watch, let love lead you.

programme.title: Standard For Life
programme.desc: Christ and His Word are inseparable! Get connected to God's Word and God's Spirit as you listen to this life transforming message live and direct from The SCOAN.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: What Are Spiritual Gifts?
programme.desc: The Bible says that such gifts or abilities are called spiritual because they are prompted by or through the Holy Spirit. In this intriguing message, T.B. Joshua teaches on the gifts of the Holy Spirit.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Friends And Heroes
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - The One That Got Away'. While Macky and the girls are minding the shop, a petty thief steals a silver fish with vital information to the rebel movement engraved on it. Can the gang get the fish back?

programme.title: Standard For Life
programme.desc: Christ and His Word are inseparable! Get connected to God's Word and God's Spirit as you listen to this life transforming message live and direct from The SCOAN.

programme.title: Another Ministry: UK
programme.desc: Join the Emmanuel TV Team and Partners as they make their way to Southampton, UK to put quality smiles on the faces of the homeless by giving them a full breakfast and sleeping bags and thermal clothes to face the winter months.

programme.title: We Are Converted By The Word
programme.desc: It is the Word that has taught us the value in the name of Jesus, the authority of the name of Jesus and our legal right to use the name of Jesus. Find out more in this message by Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: What To Consider In Prayer
programme.desc: There is a difference between praying and saying words. Discover how to think more before praying in order to enter the realm of prayer as you watch this enlightening message by TB Joshua.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Ghana
programme.desc: They are in want so that we may be their benefactor. The Emmanuel TV Team spends quality time visiting orphanages in Ghana, sharing the love of God through gifts, financial support and encouraging words.

programme.desc: Position yourself to receive, as you pray along with TB Joshua, in this special time of prayer.

programme.desc: The story of Germany's great battleships during the Second World War. With graphic recollections from veterans of the 'Kriegsmarine', this film depicts the rise during Hitler's Naval Expansion programme.

programme.desc: Presented by Richard Todd, this film portrays the story of RAF Bomber Command during the Second World War. Beginning with its birth as a fledging arm of the Force in WWI, throughout its development between the wars.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S23/E11 of 19 - Action Packed Pawn'. Corey checks out a Jason Aldean neon light, and Rick has a hoot when he checks out a ceramic owl vase made by none other than Pablo Picasso.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S23/E10 of 19 - Pawn Jam'. When a very special cowboy hat owned by President Ronald Reagan moseys into the shop, can Rick wrangle an offer? Then Chum lights up when a glowing Pearl Jam painting rocks across the counter.

programme.desc: 'S23/E5 of 19 - When Pawns Cry'. When an early handheld video game system comes into play, can Corey make a deal before it's game over? Plus, a seller brings Rick a tambourine once played by Prince.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E4 - Unprankable'. The Pawn Stars prepare for a duel when a cheque signed by Aaron Burr comes in the shop. Will Rick try to turn this cheque into cash or will a tough negotiation make the seller bounce?

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: 'S4/E13 - Soda Jerks'. A client has high expectations of Rick and the crew when he agrees to a $10 000 restoration of his 1950s soda fountain. Then a regular customer challenges the guys to revive his vintage phone booth.

programme.desc: 'S8/E20 of 50 - Casino Challenge'. The stakes are high when the forge floor is transformed into the Forged in Fire Casino. Four smiths must leave it all up to chance and allow the Wheel of Forging to determine their challenge.

programme.title: True Crime With Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Blood Brotherhood'. Two frat brothers are inseparable, but after college their friendship ends in murder. The investigation reveals a botched robbery, arson and an unusual love affair.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Two families brawl in a courthouse lobby after a rescheduled murder hearing. And, a man forgets something very important before walking into a courthouse.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Sex, Lies And Crimes'. A high school teacher blames her teenage student for their scandalous affair. Plus, an attorney is blindsided by an angry client's fist.

programme.title: Web Of Lies
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Internet Casanova'. Single mum Jenn thinks she's found the man of her dreams on a dating site, but little does she know Ray Holycross is a sociopath who preys on vulnerable women.

programme.title: Web Of Lies
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Job Of A Lifetime'. David Pauley finds the perfect job ad on Craigslist: living on a ranch like a real-life cowboy. But just as soon as he is hired, he disappears without a trace.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Home Video Hit'. In public, Max and Janeene Jones appear to have the perfect marriage. But 20 years later, an undercover police investigation reveals an unexpected killer.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Shooting Phoenix'. In 2005, a monster stalks the summer streets of Phoenix. As the body count keeps rising, can the police catch the killer before he strikes again?

programme.title: Dead On Arrival
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Road To Hell'. Kristi leaves her small hometown to pursue a movie career in LA. But when she meets a slick casting agent, her Hollywood dream soon becomes a shocking nightmare.

programme.title: Dead On Arrival
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Rock n' Roll Nightmare'. Tim leaves his hometown to join the cutting-edge music scene in Oregon. But when he gets a job at a rock club, he learns that the scene has an evil underbelly.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: 'S10/E7 - The Sweetest Man In The World'. The search for a missing bus driver reveals a complicated love triangle. It leaves investigators with more questions than answers.

programme.title: Deadliest Mums & Dads
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Tragedy Of Ayesha Ali'. When the body of 8-year-old Ayesha Ali is found at her home, investigators eventually uncover a complex web of lies, manipulation and abuse.

programme.title: Rebecca Zahau: An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When Rebecca Zahau and Max Shacknai both die in mysterious circumstances at the same mansion, their families search for answers - and the truth.

programme.title: Dead On Arrival
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Dance With The Devil'. Catherine moves to New York City to pursue her dream of dancing. When she gets caught in a love triangle, her dream gets lost in a nightmare of violence.

programme.title: A Walk From Grave
programme.desc: A man and his wife regret sending their daughter into marrying a wealthy man whose source of income is questionable.

programme.title: Okon Goes To School
programme.desc: After wasting their youthful years and reality kicks in, two friends decide to be serious and settle down.

programme.title: The Mirror
programme.desc: A lady get herself in trouble the moment she bumps into her husband's occult room.

programme.title: Love In The Air
programme.desc: A newly married wife chose to remain celibate, what could be her reasons?

programme.title: My Inlaw's Secret
programme.desc: This epic movies take a look at the two sides to every judgment and how to apply the golden rule.

programme.title: Warrior King
programme.desc: Eze Igama becomes a terrible king that is feared by all. His desire is to dominate all the kings around him. Will he succeed?

programme.title: Game Of Marriage

programme.title: Royal Benefit
programme.desc: A young boy is disappointed that his sister who he cares for is hiding something from him , but everything changes when he finds out.

programme.title: War Of Hearts
programme.desc: A man accidentally killed his neighbor during an argument, this leads to the demise of his father and mother and he becomes a fugitive.

programme.title: Dankie, Lottoland
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 of 13'. Aktrise en aanbieder Edrien Erasmus reis na Huis Helen Bellinghanhof in Oudtshoorn. Sy deel goeie nuus van Lottoland wat wense waar maak, en die tehuis nuwe hoop gee in 'n tyd van nood.

programme.title: Die Real Housewives van Pretoria
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 14'. Kiki en Mel is by 'n boksgeveg tussen bekendes waar Mel, Kiki se ware bedoelings begin bevraagteken. Tydens Rhona se Ou Klere Funksie daag 'n ongenooide gas op wat nie almal beïndruk nie.

programme.title: Poena
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 of 26'. Poena is baie gespanne oor die hofsaak wat voorlê. Die dag van Elton se oorplanting breek aan. Vis kry 'n boodskap en besef hy sal moet vir Coco daarvan sê.

programme.title: Koppieteefontein
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 of 13'. Jak de Priester kuier die week in Pretoria by die huis van beroemde Steinway Pianis, Charl du Plessis.

programme.title: Hier Gaan Ons Alweer
programme.desc: 'S21/E9 of 13'. Die meer-en-see toer skop af en die manne sê mekaar die stryd aan vir die lekkerste vis. 'Meermanne' Petri en Werner vang reuse kabeljoue om die manne op die strand se mooi vangste te troef.

programme.title: Wanderlus
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 of 13'. Hierdie week reis Hennie en Nicole deur die Boland en vang kabeljou in Valsbaai by Macassar.

programme.title: Die Groenste Vingers
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 of 13'. In hierdie uitkloprondte moet drie bloemiste twee uitdagings voltooi. Daar is 'n bosveld en middeleeuse uitdaging.

programme.title: Jan Braai Vir Erfenis
programme.desc: 'S12/E22 of 26'. In dié week se episode kyk ons na gevulde kos op die braaivuur. Burgers, steaks, chops, ribbetjies, hoender, groente en pastei. Hoe vul jy hom en hoe braai jy hom.

programme.title: 4x4 Met André
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 of 13'. André en die konvooi moet ruigtes oopkap om verder te kan ry op pad na die hoogliggende Mafefe 4x4-kamp. Dis geleë op die Afrika-Ivoorroete en geskoei op die Pedi-kultuur.

programme.title: Winslyn
programme.desc: 'S9/E21 of 26'. Winslyn fokus op alternatiewe beleggings, onder andere eiendom. Ons gesels oor Airbnb en kuier by twee akteurs wat na die Tuinroete gesemigreer het.

programme.title: Met 'n Huppel In Die Stap
programme.desc: 'S12/E21 of 26'. Navorsers bereken dat ongeveer 10% van mense ouer as 60, een of ander vorm van mishandeling of misdaad elke jaar ervaar. Kundiges gesels oor veiligheid vir seniors.

programme.title: Kwêla
programme.desc: 'S24/E35 of 48'. Ons besoek 'n vindingryke werkskeppingsprojek, ontmoet 'n 11-jarige NY Fashion Week model, kuier by Jan Boland Coetzee, SA se judo Statebondkampioen en die Kwêla Feite&Geite wenner.

programme.title: Spreekkamer
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 of 13'. Aktrise Lindie Stander kom gesels oor haar lewe as depressie-lyer. En, servikale kanker is die tweede mees algemene kanker wat by vroue aangetref word, 'n onkoloog kom gee raad.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E172 of 238'. Dis 'n nag van intense drama in die Du Plooys se huis. Dis 'n dag van groot drama van Siya en sy hele wêreld mag dalk net in duie stort.

programme.desc: 'S1/E33 of 86'. In donker tye staan die gemeenskap saam, en Anja vind dit moeilik om 'n proses aan die gang te sit. Henry se gedobbel raak 'n probleem.

programme.desc: 'S8/E87 of 132'. Aktualiteit, nuus, verkeer, weer en lekker Afrikaanse musiek is alles op die spyskaart, saam met #DieGrootOntbyt-span.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In this action comedy, Jennifer Aniston and Gerard Butler give a new meaning to the term dysfunctional couple when a bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: Family Squares
programme.desc: In this all-star family drama, the long-buried secrets of an estranged family are revealed when they gather via Zoom following the death of their matriarch.

programme.title: Down To Earth
programme.desc: Chris Rock is the signature funnyman in this hilarious comedy about a young man who is accidentally resurrected as a grumpy old millionaire who finds his life totally changed.

programme.title: Love In The Forecast
programme.desc: In this charming romantic film, an aspiring meteorologist swears off dating to concentrate on her career. However, she soon finds herself suddenly pursued by men everywhere.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: When a man meets the girl of his dreams he tells her a careless lie. The more the lie backfires the more ridiculous his quest for love becomes.

programme.title: Harvie And The Magic Museum
programme.desc: A fun-filled animation. A smart but very lively boy has one ambition, to finish the last level of his video game. But finishing it is only the start of the real adventure.

programme.title: Moonshot
programme.desc: A rom-com with a futuristic spin. As Mars is terraformed, two college students sneak aboard a space shuttle to join their significant others on the red planet.

programme.title: Dino Dana The Movie
programme.desc: A fun dinosaur adventure from director JJ Johnson. With the help of her sister and her neighbour, Dana undertakes an experiment to find out where all the kid dinosaurs are.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: Moms may relate to this comedy starring Sarah Drew (Grey's Anatomy). A busy mom's night out doesn't go according to plan when the dads are left in charge of the kids.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2
programme.desc: A thrilling, adventure-filled sequel. Bored of life in the garden, Peter goes to the big city, where he meets shady characters and ends up creating chaos for the whole family.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: As an unhappy 13-year-old who turns almost 30 overnight, Jennifer Garner is both funny and endearing in this sweet wish-fulfilment comedy. This was her breakthrough movie role.

programme.title: A Journal For Jordan
programme.desc: Denzel Washington directs this touching love story inspired by a true story and a memoir. A soldier in Iraq writes a journal filled with advice for his young son.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: A gold-digging teacher is given the boot by her fiancé, when he sees through her. She soon falls for a colleague, but faces some stiff competition.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: A gold-digging teacher is given the boot by her fiancé, when he sees through her. She soon falls for a colleague, but faces some stiff competition.

programme.title: Yvonne Orji: A Whole Me
programme.desc: Picking up where her debut special left off, Emmy-nominated Yvonne Orji returns to the stage to offer her point-of-view on the pandemic, being the child of Nigerian immigrants and much more.

programme.title: Kajillionaire
programme.desc: Evan Rachel Wood and Gina Rodriguez star in this quirky crime-comedy about a family of crooks whose relationship is shaken when they invite a stranger to join in their scams.

programme.title: Pressure Point
programme.desc: Michael Shannon cracks the whip in this inspiring sports drama. An army veteran is brought in to help transform a dysfunctional rowing team and unlock their true potential.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: An enjoyable romantic film. After returning home, a jobless reality TV host is tricked into running the town's Valentine's Day festival auction with her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: Monster Family
programme.desc: Charming animated comedy. An unhappy family plan a fun night out, but everything backfires when an evil witch curses them and they all turn into monsters.

programme.title: Did You Hear About The Morgans?
programme.desc: Hugh Grant and Sarah Jessica Parker star in this romcom. A couple with a disastrous marriage witness a murder and are forced to enter the witness relocation programme.

programme.title: Here Today
programme.desc: Billy Crystal and Tiffany Haddish team up to create a charming film. When a veteran comedy writer meets a New York street singer, they form a deep and unlikely friendship.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: A pulsating addition to the blockbuster franchise. A single mom and her kids arrive in a small town, discovering their connection to the Ghostbusters and their secret legacy.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Michael Bay returns for another instalment to the electrifying franchise. With the Autobots and Decepticons at war, the humans are forced to save the world themselves.

programme.title: The D Train
programme.desc: The head of a high school reunion committee travels to Los Angeles to track down the most popular guy from his graduating class and convince him to go to the reunion.

programme.title: Hotel Mumbai
programme.desc: Dev Patel leads a great cast in this powerful film based on the 2008 siege of the Taj Hotel. When terrorists take the hotel the staff risk their lives to protect the guests.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal and Yahya Abdul-Mateen II lead an epic chase in this Michael Bay action film. After a botched heist, two robbers hijack an ambulance to make their getaway.

programme.title: The Many Saints Of Newark
programme.desc: Alan Taylor delivers the long-awaited prequel to the HBO hit The Sopranos. Witness Tony Soprano's rise to power through the influence of his family, especially his uncle.

programme.title: A Vigilante
programme.desc: Olivia Wilde is unstoppable in this revenge movie. After escaping her violent husband, a woman goes into training and returns as a vigilante to help free others like her.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Riddle Me Dead
programme.desc: Continuing the murder mystery franchise, Tess and Logan investigate the murder of a host of a popular game show that Tess has been invited to be a part of.

programme.title: Miss Willoughby And The Haunted...
programme.desc: 'Miss Willoughby And The Haunted Bookshop'. Mystery drives this thrilling film. A professor is enlisted by old family friends to solve a paranormal mystery at their antique bookshop.

programme.title: Born A Champion
programme.desc: An intense mixed martial arts film. A retired marine skilled in jiu-jitsu gets a chance to restore his fighting reputation when he gets a rematch against an old opponent.

programme.title: Malicious Mind Games
programme.desc: A widowed mother takes a job as an overnight security guard. During her shift, she witnesses a murder, only to later discover the victim is alive and well.

programme.title: Warcraft
programme.desc: The popular fantasy gaming series makes a spectacular big-screen debut. A saga of power, survival and sacrifice unfolds when the peaceful existence of a civilisation is threatened.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Arnold Schwarzenegger team up for this thriller. A man is wrongly incarcerated and must break out of the inescapable prison he designed.

programme.title: Habit
programme.desc: In this thriller, Bella Thorne stars as a street-smart girl who gets caught in a violent drug deal. To escape the consequences, she disguises herself as a nun.

programme.title: Habit
programme.desc: In this thriller, Bella Thorne stars as a street-smart girl who gets caught in a violent drug deal. To escape the consequences, she disguises herself as a nun.

programme.title: Rising Wolf
programme.desc: A tense thriller about a young woman who is kidnapped and trapped in a high-speed elevator. With her life at stake, she is pushed to the limit and begins to realise her abilities.

programme.title: Hungry Ghosts
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 of 4'. An intriguing four-part ghost drama that explores the trauma of war as a terrifying spirit causes havoc in the Vietnamese-Australian community during the Hungry Ghost Festival.

programme.title: Ski Patrol
programme.desc: Quirky comedy with plenty of slapstick humour. A group of misfits work at a ski resort, where they soon have to band together to stop a developer from closing them down.

programme.title: Get Shorty
programme.desc: John Travolta won a Golden Globe and an American Comedy Award for his portrayal of Chili Palmer, a slick loan shark. On a trip to LA to recover a debt, he decides to produce a movie.

programme.title: The Losers
programme.desc: Based on the popular comic book series, this action film starring an all-star cast sees an elite Special Forces Unit seek revenge after they are double-crossed on a mission.

programme.title: The Hollow Point
programme.desc: Gritty crime thriller. The new sheriff of a small American town investigates a harrowing drug cartel deal that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Skyfire
programme.desc: In this exciting action film, humans are fighting to survive against Mother Nature. A volcano erupts unexpectedly, giving the people on Tianhuo Island very little time to evacuate.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: In this sequel to the hit crime drama about a group of illusionists, the four horsemen resurface and are forcibly recruited into yet another seemingly impossible heist.

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone returns for another round of action in this sequel. A security expert must save one of his own from the dangerous prison he once escaped from himself.

programme.title: Infinite
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg and Chiwetel Ejiofor drive this book-inspired sci-fi action adaptation about a man who learns he's been reincarnated many times and holds the key to saving the world.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Tom Holland and Mark Wahlberg team up to bring this iconic video game franchise to life. A seasoned treasure hunter recruits Street-smart Nathan Drake to recover a fortune.

programme.title: No Sudden Move
programme.desc: A star-studded cast drives this gripping crime film. A group of criminals is hired to steal a document, but things go awry. Now, they must work together to uncover what's happening.

programme.title: SEAL Team
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 of 14 - Head On'. Bravo Team is presented with a mission in South America unlike any other, while tensions surrounding Jason's leadership are at an all-time high.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: 'S13/E45 - Mystery Box'. Jock Zonfrillo, Melissa Leong and Andy Allen return as judges for this simmering season of Australia's popular reality cooking competition.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Legacy'. Thony is given a dire ultimatum by Garrett that could compromise her son's access to medical treatment. A rift forms between Fiona and her son, Chris, when a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Family Or Fiancé USA
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Deion And Rome: Mama Don't Preach'. A same-sex couple wishes to marry, but one groom's deeply religious mother has made it clear that she believes being gay is a sin.

programme.title: America's Got Talent Extreme
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 of 4'. The amazing showcase continues with an explosives show, acrobatics, extreme eating, and stunts by a paralysed dirt bike rider.

programme.title: Wipeout USA
programme.desc: 'S8/E14 - Nips, Flips 'n' Dips'. Aerialists, UFO-ologists and puppeteers are all battling to be crowned the Wipeout champion and take home the $25,000 prize. Hosted by John Cena, Nicole Byer, Camille Kostek.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 of 14 - A Lot Of Band-Aids And The Cooper Surrender'. Sheldon makes friends with his dorm neighbours. Also, George Sr. learns his job is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Good Sam
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Butt Of The Joke'. When Dr. Sam Griffith refuses to concede her role as chief, her father Griff orchestrates a costly surprise. Also, Sam's mother, hospital administrator Vivian, turns to her new spouse for help.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 of 18 - El Pincho'. The team searches for a notorious Colombian drug lord after he escapes from a U.S. prison. Also, Kristin begins to open up to her ex-husband about her past.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: 'S4/E18 of 20 - Came Back For You'. Spencer is ready to take the next step in his NIL journey, but everything could be at risk before it has a chance to get started.

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 of 13 - Finale'. An incredible singing competition where a group of celebrity performers wear costumes to conceal identities. One singer is eliminated each week and unmasked.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Way We Were'. Keisha hears the truth about the day she lost her sister, moving her to take a chance. Shanice and Andre enjoy a day out. Hayden and Mariah grow closer.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - If You Love Something'. Jharrel and Keisha must earn the trust of the 4400 if they genuinely want to help keep them safe. Rev continues to grow his flock.

programme.title: Black-ish

programme.title: The Man From U.N.C.L.E.
programme.desc: British director Guy Ritchie (Snatch) leads Henry Cavill (Man Of Steel) in this action comedy. A CIA agent teams up with a KGB operative to stop a black market nuclear arms deal.

programme.title: Metro
programme.desc: As hostage negotiators go, Roper (Eddie Murphy) is one of the best, but he has a way of finding trouble. This action comedy sees him play cat and mouse with a murderous bank robber.
The future of the Earth hangs in the balance due to climate change in this time travel sci-fi thriller in which one man journeys into the future to find a solution.

programme.title: Force Of Nature

programme.title: Blue Crush
programme.desc: Kate Bosworth and Michelle Rodriguez are best friends in this breezy drama. A surfer-girl prepares for a tough competition, but finds herself getting distracted by romance.

programme.title: Camp Arrowhead

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Judi Dench delivers an emotion-inducing performance. A senior citizen is arrested and charged with conspiring against her country in the mid-1930s.

programme.title: Hodge And The Lost Easter Egg

programme.title: Alex Cross
programme.desc: Tyler Perry and Matthew Fox's characters face off in a game of cat and mouse in this captivating thriller. A homicide detective tries to match wits with a serial killer.

programme.title: Playmobil The Movie

programme.title: Uglydolls

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: Teenager Sean Anderson teams with his stepfather on a mission to find his grandfather, who is thought to be missing on a mythical island.

programme.title: The Ultimate Warrior
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars in this explosive sci-fi thriller set in a futuristic New York. Only a few still live in the city where two rival gangs are at war.

programme.title: San Andreas
programme.desc: In the aftermath of an earthquake in California, a rescue-chopper pilot makes a dangerous journey across the state in order to rescue his daughter.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: When Lucy and her two sons, Michael and Sam, move to Santa Clara, they discover, to their peril, that the area is a haven for a gang of vampires.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Unable to tip a waitress, a man promises her that if he wins the lottery, she'll get half. When he wins, he wants to make good on his word, but his wife will do anything to stop this.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage drives this action thriller. A hunter catches a white jaguar, but all hell breaks loose when he ships it on the same ship as an arrested assassin.

programme.title: Game of Death
programme.desc: Bruce Lee plays a young kung fu movie star whom the villainous Dr Land wants to control. He must face off Land's fighters in order to defend his independence.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: A married couple is surprised to find that they are both assassins hired by competing agencies to kill each other.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Denzel Washington reprises his role as the hard vigilante Robert McCall. This time he is pushed to his limit when he seeks justice and revenge for someone he loved and lost.

programme.title: Under Siege
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL, now a cook, is the only person who can stop a gang of terrorists when they seize control of a US Navy battleship.

programme.title: Under Siege
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL, now a cook, is the only person who can stop a gang of terrorists when they seize control of a US Navy battleship.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day Of Reckoning
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme reprises his role as the original Universal Soldier in the sixth film of the franchise. This time the Universal Soldiers are targeted by one lone warrior.

programme.title: Special - Why Are There So Many...
programme.desc: 'Special - Why Are There So Many Movies About Boxing?'. A look at boxing movies.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers
programme.desc: A brother and sister driving home through isolated countryside for spring break encounter a flesh-eating creature.

programme.title: Cradle 2 The Grave
programme.desc: Jet Li plays a Taiwanese intelligence officer who teams up with a thief for a rescue operation in this slick action crime thriller from the director of 'Romeo Must Die'.

programme.title: Young Hearts
programme.desc: A teen love story that explores the discomfort that comes with first relationships.

programme.title: Under Siege 2: Dark Territory
programme.desc: An ex-Navy Seal gets on a train to start a vacation with his niece. Early into the trip terrorists board the train and use it to hijack a top-secret US satellite.

programme.title: What Women Want
programme.desc: Nick Marshall was the ultimate man's man until one night, in the privacy of his Rat Pack dream apartment, his eyes and ears opened more than he could have imagined or ever dreamed of.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg and Denzel Washington find themselves in way over their heads in this action-packed shoot 'em up. They must find a way to work together in order to survive.

programme.title: Triumph
programme.desc: Inspired by a real story, a determined high school senior strives to be a wrestler one last time despite having cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan are back but the game has changed. They have to return to the dangerous world to rescue one of their own.

programme.title: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A noir thriller about an auto theft police detective who tries to help a friend find his missing daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Chasing Skinwalkers'. Paul investigates evil shapeshifters known as skinwalkers. He tracks these mythical beasts from the heart of the Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Beast Of Bray Road'. Experts analyse new evidence that could prove the Beast of Bray Road is terrorised a Wisconsin town. Plus, is the human-wolf hybrid spreading across the US?

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Memories, Mermaids And More'. The Osbournes plunge deep into the paranormal sea to find proof that mermaids exist. Plus, have Ozzy and Sharon fallen victim to the Mandela Effect?

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Time To Believe'. Jack tries to convince his parents that time travel is real! He also shares evidence of an Alexa possessed by an evil spirit and an Ice Age UFO.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Dying Days Of Winter'. Neil Darish is laying low after announcing his plan to develop the Motherlode mine into a mine tour to encourage tourists to visit McCarthy.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Stockholm Syndrome'. Don Wildman visits a plaza in Sweden that was at the centre of an infamous heist. He also examines a monument in Florida that recalls a near catastrophic war.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Men In Black'. Strange men in black suits knock on the door of a UFO witness after an eerie light show. A woman is terrorized by small humanoid creatures that only she can see.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Pearl Harbor'. December 7th, 1941 - a day of infamy that changed America forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did Franklin Roosevelt know about the attack beforehand?

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Alien Invasion'. Across America, there are more UFO sightings than ever before. A team of UFO investigators want to find out what lies behind this increasing number of reports.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Unmasking The Myth'. In the finale, Josh rafts into the remotest corners of Bhutan to capture some of his best evidence yet of the reclusive Yeti.

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Black Ops Conspiracy'. Many people believe that Arizona is the centre of a government cover-up of alien activity. The team travel to Sedona, a known hotspot, to investigate.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Out Of Thin Air'. Josh's quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan. He uses bait to try and force an encounter with the beast.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - The Disaster That Saved London'. Don Wildman visits London where a tall column commemorates the Great Fire of 1666. In Genoa, Nevada, he views a monument to a frontiersman.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Alien Flight Plan'. A bush pilot witnesses unsettling UFO activity. A former government operative reveals top-secret coordinates to an alleged alien base.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Code Wars'. American code breakers have given them an edge in many conflicts. Now, code breakers work in the murky world of cyberspace to stop terrorists before they can strike.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Secrets of Mount Hayes'. Experts investigate reports of a secret alien base deep inside Alaska's highest mountain. Video evidence suggests extra-terrestrial activity in Fairbanks.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Legend Of The Crystal Skull'. Josh Gates takes on Central America's jungles to investigate the crystal skull discovered by an adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - The Sun's Evil Twin'. Witnesses photograph two suns in the sky over Indonesia - is this the first sighting of the Sun's dark twin that could spell imminent danger to Earth?

programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - It's Coming for the Cabin'. Jim and his father have gone camping in the Upper Peninsula of Michigan. But at the dead of night, an unknown creature approaches their tent.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Higginsport School'. An unknown spirit lurks in the empty hallways of Ohio's Higginsport School. Is it evidence of a darker haunting caused by recent deaths on the property?

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - White Hill Mansion'. Nick and Katrina are at New Jersey's White Hill Mansion. While gathering evidence of a child in the attic, the mansion's history as a mob hangout raises concerns.

programme.title: Kies Die Lewe
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Selfdood, depressie en behandelingsopsies. Anza Naudé was klaar met die lewe totdat sy besef het medikasie alleen is nie die antwoord nie. Skakel in vir Anza se storie.

programme.title: Pak Weg, Pak Reg
programme.desc: 'S3/E5'. Suzy Joubert trek binnekort by haar kêrel in, maar sy huis het nie plek vir haar om haar merk te maak nie. Carin en Jani help vir Suzy om haar kêrel se plek reg te ruk voor sy intrek.

programme.title: Pak Weg, Pak Reg
programme.desc: 'S3/E6'. Anel van den Bergeen en haar gesin het twee jaar gelede Malmesbury toe getrek, maar sodra sy een vertrek regpak, staan die volgende kamer op sy kop. Tuis se ontrommel-span help vir Anel om 'n bietjie orde te skep.

programme.title: Pak Weg, Pak Reg
programme.desc: 'S3/E7'. Marisa de Vries se wasgoedkamer is besig om stadig te verdrink onder al die rommel. Tuis se ontrommel span help vir Marisa om haar was-goedkamer in 'n is-goedkamer te verander.

programme.title: Pak Weg, Pak Reg
programme.desc: 'S3/E8'. Whitney Mouton het 'n naelsalon in die stoorkamer van haar huis ingerig, maar daar is nie genoeg pakplek vir die naellak nie. Carin en Jani help vir Whitney om plek te maak vir werk en wegpak.

programme.title: Sing In Harmonie
programme.desc: 'S2/E15'. Die grootste skoolkore-kompetisie is terug met koorsang van ons land se top skoolkore. Kom reis saam met ons deur die land op soek na die beste skoolkore in Suid-Afrika.

programme.title: Wys My 'n Huis
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. In hierdie episode is jong verloofdes Kayla en Darren op soek na hul eerste huis in Brakpan. Tydens hul ontmoeting met eiendomsagent Calvin word dit duidelik dat Darren kompromieë moet aangaan, want Kayla se smaak spel Sandton.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Dinge raak kleurvol in Kemptonpark. Aaanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels help vir Jannie en Annemarie du Randt om hul TV-kamer 'n bietjie kleur te gee.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Ons kuier in Grabouw op die Paul Clüver Familielandgoed waar Lynette Francis-Puren uitvind hoe hulle vrugte- en wynproduksiemetodes aangepas is om klimaatsverandering teen te werk deur die natuur aan die stuur te sit.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E7'. James Faber, voorsitter van die RPO, boer saam met sy broer Gert en dié se seun, Jaco, met besproeiingsgewasse en vee naby Barkly-Wes in die Noord-Kaap. Bek-en-klouseer is een van die kopsorge wat ons bespreek.

programme.title: Nisboere
programme.desc: 'S7/E5'. Ons reis die land vol om innoverende landbou-entrepreneurs te ontmoet wat woeker op 'n klein stukkie grond.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Daar is een dag oor voor die top-drie deelnemers bepaal word. In dié episode kyk ons of die vroue goeie versorgers is. Stacy het 'n besluit om te neem en emosies loop hoog nadat die top-drie deelnemers aangekondig is.

programme.title: Die VIA-Kersmark
programme.desc: VIA-Kersmark gee lekker idees vir geskenke dié kerstyd. Ons wys en spog met plaaslike entrepreneurs se produkte en só kry álmal geskenke onder die kersboom hierdie jaar.

programme.title: Jan - R.S.V.P
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Michelin-ster-sjef Jan Hendrik van der Westhuizen omskep 'n plaashuisie in SA in 'n eetkamer en nooi Annelize van der Ryst en Ingrid Jones vir ete. Dié kuier inspireer 'n dis wat op die spyskaart van JAN in Nice bedien gaan word.

programme.title: Kies Die Lewe
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Depressie na lewensveranderende trauma. Na 'n duikongeluk op 26 het Tommy se lewe onherroeplik verander. Skakel in vir Tommy se storie op Kies die lewe met Ivor Swartz.

programme.title: Minki
programme.desc: 'S13/E7'. Wanneer jy Manuel Escórcio in Afrikaans hoor sing, sou jy nooit kon dink sy moedertaal is eintlik Portugees nie. Hy vertel van sy vroeë kinderjare in Mosambiek en hoe sy sangtalent ontdek is. Ons verras hom met 'n mede-sanger.

programme.title: Martelize Se Stamtafel
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. In dié kook-en-geselsprogram kuier die radio-omroeper, Martelize Brink, met bekendes in haar kombuis en kook disse uit hul plek van herkoms. Haar gaste leer ook meer oor hul eie stambome.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels kuier in Nigel. Hulle help vir Ilze Helberg om haar eetkamer 'n bietjie elegansie te gee.

programme.title: Konings Van Kitskos
programme.desc: 'S7/E7'. Die konings word soos sjeiks behandel by 'n restaurant geïnspireer deur die luukse koffiewinkels van Doebai. Daarna maak hulle hul kiewe nat by 'n nuwe 'craft'-distilleerdery in Boksburg.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Ware...
programme.desc: 'Huisgenoot Ware Lewensdramas: Vlees En Bloed. S1/E7'. Wanneer Wilmar Valentine skoolgronde betree en daarna Erin Fourie 22 keer met 'n mes steek, wonder die hele land wat regtig deur so 'n persoon se gedagtes gaan om dit te kan doen.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes
programme.desc: 'S3/E7'. Ons is op soek na die land se blokraai-boffin. Drie deelnemers se woordeskat en taalkennis word op die proef gestel om te kyk wie uiteindelik blokraai-koning kraai. Cintaine Schutte is die aanbieder.

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S3/E5'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!

programme.title: Gesondheid, Prontuit
programme.desc: 'S3/E12'. Vind uit hoe Rilana Wolmerans en Dean Genade se lewens omvergewerp is na 'n diagnose van Graves se siekte, en hul uitdagings om met hierdie kondisie saam te leef.

programme.title: Minki
programme.desc: 'S13/E8'. Lyntjie Jaars kuier in Minki se sitkamer. Sy's 'n Namakwalander in murg en been, en vertel van haar grootwordjare in die Noord-Kaap. Sy het sedertdien haar merk in die vermaaklikheidbedryf gemaak. 'n Rolmodel verras haar.

programme.title: Kies Die Lewe
programme.desc: 'S1/E13'. Die bekende Amalia Uys praat vir die eerste keer openlik oor haar depressie en haar holistiese benadering tot behandeling. Skakel in vir Amalia se storie op Kies die lewe met Ivor Swartz.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels vat dinge vas in Randfontein. Hulle help vir Roxy van Heerden dat haar slaapkamer haar persoonlikheid weerspieël.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Ware...

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. 'n Enkelpa soek advies oor hoe om met sy jong dogter oor menstruasie te praat en 'n ander ouer wonder tot wanneer haar seun en dogter saam kan bad. Dr. Elna en die span gesels oor menopouse en lae libido.

programme.title: Jan - R.S.V.P

programme.title: Gesondheid, Prontuit

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E7'. James Faber, voorsitter van die RPO, boer saam met sy broer Gert en dié se seun, Jaco, met besproeiingsgewasse en vee naby Barkly-Wes in die Noord-Kaap. Bek-en-klouseer is een van die kopsorge wat ons bespreek.

programme.title: Martelize Se Stamtafel
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. In dié kook-en-geselsprogram kuier die radio-omroeper, Martelize Brink, met bekendes in haar kombuis en kook disse uit hul plek van herkoms. Haar gaste leer ook meer oor hul eie stambome.

programme.title: Nisboere
programme.desc: 'S7/E5'. Ons reis die land vol om innoverende landbou-entrepreneurs te ontmoet wat woeker op 'n klein stukkie grond.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels kuier in Nigel. Hulle help vir Ilze Helberg om haar eetkamer 'n bietjie elegansie te gee.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Lynette Francis-Puren ontmoet vir Danie Bester - 'n boer wat dinge reg doen! Hy is daarop ingestel om alle tegnologie, saad- en gewasbeskerming rég te gebruik vir die behoud van die tegnologie sowel as die natuur.

programme.title: Kookpunt
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Sjefs Simoné, Nick en sy vrou, Julandi, kook dit uit oor drie rondes om as Kookpunt-kampioen gekroon te word.

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S18/E2'. Dit is 'n Pretoria-braai! Shaun en Sulette sit varkfilet-kebabs voor, terwyl Christo en Phillip beeshaas oor die kole gooi. Wynand en Elani bederf hul gaste met garnale.

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S3/E6'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!

programme.title: Kies Die Lewe
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Angs, depressie en liggaamsdismorfie. Jeandré Hammond was nog altyd iemand wat geweldige druk op homself geplaas het en dit het tot baie angs gelei. Skakel in vir Jeandré se storie.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Old Friends, New Upgrades'. Lyndsay and Leslie help their old school friends sell a dated tri-level home in a neighborhood of new builds.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S26/E8 - Gulf Shores, Alabama'. Two sisters search for a vacation home in the Gulf Shores area of Alabama. With seven kids between them, it may be tricky to find a property with enough space.

programme.title: Fixer Upper

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Back To The Client Game'. Alison takes on a young Chicago couple with a big wish list and a tight budget. She'll have to use all her tricks to create their dream home.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Tiny Condo, Big Reno'. Mina and Karen renovate a tiny condo in the Old Southside. They try to maximise the space with loads of art deco character and a remodelled bathroom.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - The Littlest House'. A savvy business woman is tired of living with her mum, so she enlists Ben and Erin's expertise. She wants a small property with a porch.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
